title: Why is t_a1_first_cc test failing?
body:
I am setting up a development environment to start contributing to Verilator, but am getting a link-time error on `make test`:
```
Features (based on environment or compiled-in support):
    SystemC found      = 0
	perl /Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../bin/verilator --prefix Vt_a1_first_cc ../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp --exe --make gmake --x-assign unique -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --debug --debugi 0 --gdbbt --no-dump-tree --trace --clk clk  -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc t/t_a1_first_cc.v    > obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/vlt_compile.log
sh: gdb: command not found
-Info: --gdbbt ignored: gdb doesn't seem to be working
Starting Verilator 4.227 devel rev v4.226-20-g752f4250
Starting Verilator 4.227 devel rev v4.226-20-g752f4250
	make -C obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -f /Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/Makefile_obj --no-print-directory VM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc CPPFLAGS_DRIVER=-DT_A1_FIRST_CC  OPT_FAST=-O0 OPT_GLOBAL=-O0 Vt_a1_first_cc    > obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/vlt_gcc.log
driver: Entering directory '/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc'
/opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12  -I.  -MMD -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc___024root.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
/opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12    Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o verilated.o verilated_vcd_c.o Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a      -o Vt_a1_first_cc
Undefined symbols for architecture arm64:
  "__Z13sc_time_stampv", referenced from:
      __Z15vl_time_stamp64v in Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o
ld: symbol(s) not found for architecture arm64
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
make[1]: *** [Vt_a1_first_cc] Error 1
driver: Leaving directory '/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc'
%Warning: vlt/t_a1_first_cc: Exec of make failed: /opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12  -I.  -MMD -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc___024root.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp

vlt/t_a1_first_cc: %Error: Exec of make failed: /opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12  -I.  -MMD -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc___024root.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
vlt/t_a1_first_cc: FAILED: Exec of make failed: /opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12  -I.  -MMD -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc___024root.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
==SUMMARY: Passed 0  Failed 1  Unsup 0  Time 0:00
==SUMMARY: Passed 0  Failed 1  Unsup 0  Time 0:00

======================================================================
	#vlt/t_a1_first_cc: %Error: Exec of make failed: /opt/homebrew/bin/g++-12  -I.  -MMD -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/Users/benjaminmordaunt/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc___024root.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
		make && test_regress/t/t_a1_first_cc.pl  --vlt
TESTS DONE, FAILED: Passed 0  Failed 1  Unsup 0  Time 0:00
make: *** [smoke-test] Error 10
```

Of most interest are the lines:
```
Undefined symbols for architecture arm64:
  "__Z13sc_time_stampv", referenced from:
      __Z15vl_time_stamp64v in Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o
ld: symbol(s) not found for architecture arm64
```

The `sc_time_stampv" symbol seems to suggest it is trying to link to a SystemC symbol, but the Makefile has already established that I do not have SystemC installed, and do not care for/need it.

I tried investigating where the dependency chain is here, but I believe `ar` was used to archive together several binary files so am not sure what's going wrong here.

Thanks for your help!
